description_long: This is a blue, metallic can with a hexagonal profile, featuring a pull tab on top and a partially open drinking slot. The can's surface is decorated with white, slightly blurred text that reads 'Tasty Soda', and it has stylized white and gray graphic elements, including vent-like patterns and horizontal lines. The top of the can is silver-gray, with a raised rim and a central pull tab, typical of beverage cans. The body of the can is slightly faceted, giving it a more angular appearance than a standard cylindrical can. The can appears to be unopened, with the pull tab still attached, and the overall design suggests a modern, urban beverage container. There are no visible illustrations indicating juice flavor, and the can's graphics are more abstract and text-based.
description: A blue, hexagonal metal can with a silver pull tab and white 'Tasty Soda' text, featuring abstract white and gray graphics.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blurred 'Tasty Soda' text and the silver pull tab on top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the white vent-like graphic and the partially open pull tab.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying abstract white lines and a mostly blue surface with minimal text.
description_view_3: Angled view with the 'Tasty Soda' text more visible and the pull tab open.
